article.title: SEO for Startups - How to Get Your First 1000 Organic Visitors
article.body_markdown:
Startups do not have marketing budgets. They have a product, a domain, and the need for customers.

SEO is the highest-ROI channel for early-stage startups. It costs time but not money. And the traffic compounds.

**Month 1: Foundation** - Target 15-20 articles covering your product space: comparison posts, how-to guides, definition pages. Use AI to produce them in hours, not weeks.

**Month 2: Expand** - Target 35-50 total articles. Add internal links. Submit to free directories. See first impressions in Search Console.

**Month 3: Optimize** - Identify which articles get impressions. Improve them. Cross-post to Dev.to and Medium. First organic visitors arrive.

**The Free Startup SEO Stack:**
- Content: SEO Spark (AI blog writer)
- Analytics: Google Search Console
- Keywords: Google Keyword Planner
- Distribution: Dev.to, Medium, Reddit, X

I built [SEO Spark](https://seospark.net) for founders who need content but do not have time. 60 seconds per article. 3 free, no credit card.
